mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users)::int AS user_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM boards WHERE status = 1)::int AS board_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM boards WHERE status = 0)::int AS disabled_board_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE status = 1)::int AS post_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE status = 0)::int AS hidden_post_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM replies WHERE status = 1)::int AS reply_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM replies WHERE status = 0)::int AS hidden_reply_count
